description: Update the operational status of the current facility in EPA Tier2 Submit. The facility was fully automated and is now entirely remote. Navigate to the Facility Identification section and change the operational status from 'Manned' to 'Unmanned' (ensure Manned is unchecked) and set the Maximum No. of Occupants to 0. Additionally, because the facility removed its large chemical tanks, change the regulatory applicability for BOTH 'Subject to Emergency Planning under Section 302 of EPCRA' and 'Subject to Chemical Accident Prevention under Section 112(r) of CAA' to 'No'. Save the updated facility record and export the submission file to C:\Tier2Submit\Data\permian_alpha_updated.t2s using File > Create Submission.
